name: Mercuries Life Insurance Co., Ltd.
summary: Mercuries Life Insurance Co., Ltd. provides life insurance products primarily in Taiwan. The company also offers term life, health, accident, annuities, group, travel safety, and investment insurance products, as well as pension, group, and bank channel goods insurance products. It operates through six branch offices located in Taipei, Taichung, Chiayi, Tainan, and Kaohsiung. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.
